items.title: W.H.O. Declares Ebola Outbreak a Global Health Emergency
items.summary: Just a day after the announcement, cases were confirmed in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda. There is no approved vaccine for this species of Ebola.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Australia news live: NSW police make 993 arrests in four-day domestic violence sweep
items.summary: Police laid 2,063 charges and conducted 1,847 bail compliance checks in operation targeting offenders with a history of domestic violence. Follow today’s news live Get our break...
